summary: Complete the bounded C10 presentation/context slice: fixed OpenSCAD system prompt, configured model label, assistant/proposal copy actions, insert-at-cursor dispatch, and live diagnostics/parameter context wiring.

decisions.decision: Prepend every configured conversation request with one app-owned OpenSCAD system instruction; context toggles remain separate system content so user source cannot replace the fixed instruction.
decisions.rationale: FR-10.2 requires a per-conversation app-fixed prompt that instructs the model to produce OpenSCAD.

decisions.decision: Expose copy for assistant prose and code, and insert-at-cursor for extracted code; insertion dispatches one ai-panel edit command using the active CodeMirror selection when available.
decisions.rationale: FR-10.4 requires copy and insert-at-cursor alongside the already reviewable apply-as-edit flow; the runtime command bus remains the single mutation boundary.

decisions.decision: Send the active render diagnostics and extracted parameter defaults from Workbench to the AI context toggles; screenshot capture remains pending until a viewer-owned capture port is connected.
decisions.rationale: This closes the available source/diagnostics/parameters context without inventing a second viewer capture owner.

testEvidence.criterion: The AI panel sends the fixed prompt and exposes copy/insert actions while preserving existing diff review.
testEvidence.test: Run the focused AI application/UI tests once after implementation.

red.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/ai/AiConversationPanel.test.tsx tests/application/ai tests/ui/ai
red.outcome: RED: the initial new assertion expected code without the extractor's preserved trailing newline; the product behavior was correct and the expectation was corrected to assert the code content.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/ai/AiConversationPanel.test.tsx tests/application/ai tests/ui/ai

questions: C10 agent tool rounds, conversation hydration/deletion, viewer screenshot context, and hosted AC-10.c/d evidence remain pending.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
